ai_coach_description: Configure your AI coach preferences, personality, and data access.
automation_desc: Enable proactive analysis and automated updates.
automation_desc_auto_analysis: Automatically run AI analysis on every new workout ingested.
automation_desc_daily_brief: Prepare a summary of your recovery and plan every morning.
automation_desc_weekly_reports: Generate a detailed PDF report of your training performance every Sunday.
automation_nutrition_desc: Evaluate meal quality and compliance automatically.
automation_proactive_desc: Allow the coach to send you unprompted tips and warnings.
automation_readiness_desc: Generate coaching tips for your day automatically.
automation_thoughtful_desc: Use advanced reasoning for more thorough activity breakdowns.
automation_tool_approval_desc: Ask for approval before running certain AI tool actions.
automation_workouts_desc: Generate insights for every workout that syncs.
automation_workouts_upgrade_desc: Automatically generate insights for every workout without manual intervention.
automation_nutrition_upgrade_desc: Automatically evaluate meal quality and compliance as soon as data syncs.
automation_readiness_upgrade_desc: Automatically receive coaching tips and readiness insights for your day.
automation_thoughtful_upgrade_desc: Get more thorough activity breakdowns with our most powerful AI engine.
automation_proactive_upgrade_desc: Receive personalized training tips and recovery warnings automatically.
billing_description: Manage your subscription and billing information.
billing_trust_cancel_desc: Downgrade in one click and keep your training history.
billing_trust_prorated_desc: Move to Pro anytime and only pay the difference.
billing_trust_secure_desc: Powered by Stripe with encrypted payment processing.
billing_unavailable_desc: We are currently performing maintenance on our subscription system. New subscriptions and plan changes are temporarily disabled, but existing subscriptions remain active and functional.
coach_help_name: How should your coach refer to themselves?
coach_help_voice: Voice settings for dictation and audio feedback.
coach_section_personality_desc: Adjust how your coach communicates with you.
coach_analysis_levels_desc: Choose the depth of analysis for your training data.
coach_communication_desc: Control how the AI coach interacts with you in chat.
coach_conversational_desc: Allow the coach to ask proactive follow-up questions to keep the session moving.
coach_data_privacy_desc: Control what data the AI coach can access for analysis.
coach_nutrition_analysis_desc: Allow the AI to analyze your nutrition data and provide feedback.
coach_update_notes_desc: Allow AI workout summaries to be captured as notes.
coach_model_experimental_desc: What we're cooking in the lab. Cutting-edge but potentially unstable.
coach_model_quick_desc: A well balanced experience with rapid-fire feedback.
coach_model_thoughtful_desc: State of the art, elite level intelligence for deep-dive strategy.
coach_upgrade_analysis_desc: Unlock our most advanced AI analysis engines.
danger_account_desc: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please be certain.
danger_activities_wipe_desc: Remove all actual activity data imported from external sources (Strava, Garmin, Intervals.icu, etc.). This is useful for resolving integration conflicts or clearing duplicate activities.
danger_ai_wipe_desc: Remove all AI-generated workout analysis, recommendations, and reports. This will not delete your actual workout data, only the AI insights.
danger_athlete_wipe_desc: Remove all AI-generated athlete profiles and clear cached performance scores. This is useful if your scores were calculated using duplicate workout data.
danger_error_coaching: Exit coaching mode before using account deletion.
danger_error_impersonating: Stop impersonating before using account deletion.
danger_modal_clear_future_body: Are you sure? This will delete ALL future planned workouts from your schedule AND remove them from Intervals.icu.
danger_modal_clear_future_desc: Confirm the removal of upcoming training sessions.
danger_modal_clear_past_body: Are you sure? This will delete ALL past planned workouts that were NOT completed. This only affects workouts managed by CoachWatts.
danger_modal_clear_past_desc: Confirm the removal of non-completed past training sessions.
danger_modal_delete_account_body: All your data including workouts, metrics, and reports will be permanently deleted.
danger_modal_delete_account_desc: Dangerous: This will permanently delete your entire account and all data.
danger_modal_wipe_activities_body: All imported workouts, performance scores, and FIT files will be permanently removed from your account. You will need to re-sync your integrations to recover this data.
danger_modal_wipe_activities_desc: Dangerous: This will delete ALL actual workout data and raw files.
danger_modal_wipe_ai_body: Are you sure? This will delete all AI-generated workout analyses, recommendations, and reports. You can regenerate them individually.
danger_modal_wipe_ai_desc: Confirm the removal of AI-generated insights and reports.
danger_modal_wipe_nutrition_body: All calorie, macro, and hydration data will be permanently deleted. Related AI plans and recommendations will also be cleared.
danger_modal_wipe_nutrition_desc: Confirm the removal of imported nutrition data.
danger_modal_wipe_profiles_body: Are you sure? This will permanently delete all AI athlete profiles and reset your performance scores (Fitness, Recovery, etc.). You will need to regenerate them from the dashboard.
danger_modal_wipe_profiles_desc: Confirm the irreversible deletion of AI athlete profiles and scores.
danger_modal_wipe_wellness_body: All HRV, RHR, and Sleep logs will be permanently deleted. This is typically used to fix ingestion errors from specific sources.
danger_modal_wipe_wellness_desc: Confirm the removal of imported health metrics.
danger_nutrition_wipe_desc: Clear all imported calorie, macro, and hydration data. This will also remove any AI-generated nutrition plans or recommendations.
danger_schedule_clear_desc: Remove planned workouts from your schedule. This is useful if you want to regenerate your plan or clean up old entries.
danger_toast_account_deleted_desc: Your account has been scheduled for deletion. Signing out...
danger_toast_activities_wiped_desc: Permanently deleted {workouts} workouts and {fitFiles} raw files.
danger_toast_profiles_wiped_desc: Removed {count} profile records and reset scores.
danger_wellness_wipe_desc: Clear all imported health metrics including HRV, RHR, SpO2, and Sleep logs. This does not affect your workout data.
danger_zone_description: Manage sensitive account settings and data deletion.
dev_description: Manage your API keys and access developer documentation.
dev_keys_empty: You haven't created any API keys yet.
dev_modal_create_desc: Give your new API key a name to help you identify it later.
dev_modal_revoke_desc: Are you sure you want to revoke this API key? Any applications using this key will immediately lose access.
dev_modal_save_desc: For security reasons, we can only show this key once. If you lose it, you'll need to create a new one.
dev_section_api_desc: Explore our API endpoints and learn how to integrate with Coach Watts.
dev_section_data_desc: Explore the raw and processed data ingested from your connected devices and apps.
dev_section_oauth_desc: Create and manage OAuth 2.0 applications for third-party integrations.
dev_section_tickets_desc: Track the status and resolution of the issues you've reported.
dev_section_version_desc: View the Coach Watts version history, release notes, and new features.
identity_desc: Personalize how the coach understands your background.
identity_context_desc: Share details about your injuries, experience, goals, or preferences. The AI will use this to personalize your coaching.
identity_context_placeholder: e.g., I'm recovering from a knee injury. I prefer high cadence. I'm training for my first Ironman.
identity_help_bio: Tell the coach about your experience, current goals, or specific limitations.
identity_nickname_desc: What should the AI coach call you?
quotas_desc: Monitor your AI usage and current plan limits.
quotas_empty: No active quotas found for your tier.
quotas_trial_active_desc: Enjoy Supporter-level quotas for unrestricted exploration until {date}.
quotas_trial_active_title: You are on an active Performance Trial
quotas_upgrade_desc: Upgrade your plan to get higher quotas and advanced coaching features.
quotas_footer_note: Calendar-day quotas reset at midnight. Rolling quotas refill gradually as older usage falls out of the time window shown above.
toast_settings_saved_desc: Your AI coach settings have been updated
upgrade_banner_desc: Unlock the full potential of your AI Coach with a paid plan. Get automatic analysis, thoughtful analysis, and proactive coaching to take your training to the next level.
usage_history_empty: No AI activity found in your history.
